items.title: Commonwealth Master’s Scholarships
items.institution: Commonwealth Scholarship Commission in the UK
items.funding: If a Scholar shares that they have a disability, a full assessment of their needs and eligibility for additional financial support will be offered by the CSC.
requirements: Intended Beneficiaries: Commonwealth Master’s Scholarships are for candidates from eligible low and middle income Commonwealth countries, to undertake full-time taught Master’s study at a UK university.
Each nominator oversees its own selection process and may have additional eligibility criteria.
Applicants must check with the nominator for their specific advice and rules for applying, and their own eligibility criteria.

items.summary: The agency-nominated Master’s programme is one of three Master’s programmes offered by the Commonwealth Scholarship Commission.

items.title: Commonwealth Shared Scholarships
items.institution: Commonwealth Scholarship Commission in the UK
items.funding: If a Scholar shares that they have a disability, a full assessment of their needs and eligibility for additional financial support will be offered by the CSC.
requirements: Candidates must also apply and secure admission for the chosen university course in addition to applying for a Commonwealth Shared Scholarship.
Please check with your chosen university for specific advice on when to apply, admission requirements, and rules for applying.
Supporting documentation Applications must include supporting documentation to be eligible.
